# docs-button

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar button that opens a sidebar listing edited markdown design docs in the conversation worktree.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Pane.Register` "conv-docs", `Conversation.ActionBar` → `DocsButton`
  - Uses: `conversations.useConversationById`
